title: Noseedenian: Buzzshock AlienEvo AddonPack
description: Nosedeenian AddonPack for Alien Evolution: Palladium Addon, adding new alien species, Nosedeenian!
body:
##### Important Info!
##### 
##### The mod only supports vanilla mobs for overcharge ability. Any other mod that adds new mobs to the game will not charge the overcharge bar. Maybe in future i will add compatibility with thoes popular mob mods but as for now only vanilla mobs will work!!!!!!!

## **Content**
 
 This addonpack adds new alien species Nosedeenians!! One of the most underused Ben 10 Aliens 
 that had potential for being more than a gag alien now can be used in your game!

## **Obtainment**

- You need to have your Omnitrix equipped and **not** be transformed into any alien.

- Use a lightning rod and stand near it during a thunderstorm to get struck by lightning.

- Now your Nosedeenian will be ready to use!

## **Abilities**

- Lightning Throw - Lets you throw a lightning bolt into your enemies, stunning them and dealing dmg (Unlocked at start)
  
- Electric Blitz - Lets you blitz through mobs at high speeds, but uses your energy. (Unlocked via skill tree)
  
- Electric Beams - Shoot two electric beams that deal really high dmg, but use a lot of your energy. (Unlocked via skill tree)
  
- Electro Syntesis - Use your stored energy to heal all wounds. (Unlocked via skill tree)
  
- Sonic Laugh - Supersonic laugh that throws enemies away and leaves them stunned. (Unlocked at start)
  
- Overcharge - When killing enemies, your Overcharge bar will fill up until it reaches max; then you will be faster, stronger, and more durable. (Unlocked at start)
  
- Overcharge Discharge - When your Overcharge meter is between 600-400, discharges your excess energy, dealing a massive amount of damage but leaves you tired. (Unlocked via skill tree)

### **Dependencies**

- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
- [Alien Evolution (1.1.0 - 1.1.1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
